title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Lifespace is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Lifespace has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
